panels.title: Services DOWN — Detail
panels.description: Daftar service yang sedang DOWN (up==0) beserta instance-nya.

panels.title: Services DOWN — Which ones?
panels.description: Service yang gagal di-scrape (up==0). Kosong = semua sehat.

panels.title: Resource Usage Summary
panels.description: Aggregate resource consumption across all scraped services.

panels.title: Total RAM Usage (MB)
panels.description: Sum of resident memory across all services (MB).

panels.title: Total Goroutines (count)
panels.description: Sum of Go goroutines across all services.

panels.title: Service Status & Health
panels.description: Status, durasi scrape, dan jumlah sample per target.

panels.title: HTTP Traffic
panels.description: Throughput, error, latensi, dan beban request per service mikro.

panels.title: HTTP Requests In-Flight (count)
panels.description: Jumlah request sedang diproses per service.

panels.title: Service Resource Usage
panels.description: Penggunaan memori, CPU, goroutine, dan FD per service (Go runtime).

panels.title: Databases — MariaDB
panels.description: Koneksi, query throughput, dan error koneksi per instance MariaDB.

panels.title: Aborted Connects / sec (ops)
panels.description: Koneksi tertolak per detik (indikasi masalah auth/limit).

panels.title: Cache — Redis
panels.description: Memori, hit-rate, throughput, dan koneksi Redis (cache Module).

panels.title: TimescaleDB / PostgreSQL
panels.description: Koneksi, transaksi (TPS), dan cache hit ratio per instance TimescaleDB.

panels.title: Messaging — NATS & MQTT
panels.description: Broker pesan: koneksi, JetStream, dan throughput NATS & Mosquitto.

panels.title: API Gateway — Kong
panels.description: Traffic, latensi, bandwidth, dan kesehatan upstream Kong.

panels.title: Service Detail (pilih service ↓)
panels.description: Panel interaktif — pilih satu/multi service dari variabel di atas untuk drill-down.
